ddls:
CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the job */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company posting the job */,
  "location" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the job */,
  "type" INTEGER /* Reference to the employment type */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Reference to the experience level */,
  "years_exp" TEXT /* Years of experience required */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the job is located */,
  "skills" TEXT /* Skills required for the job */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the job */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits offered by the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job responsibilities and requirements */,
  "posted_date" TEXT /* Date when the job was posted */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Application deadline for the job */,
  "recruiter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recruiter managing the job posting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_recruiter_id FOREIGN KEY ("recruiter_id") REFERENCES recruiters ("recruiter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_level FOREIGN KEY ("level") REFERENCES experience_levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES employment_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about job postings */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's website URL */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the company (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the company */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the job is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the job is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the job is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the employment type (e.g., Full Time, Part Time) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the employment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experience_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experience level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the experience level (e.g., Entry Level, Experienced) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the experience level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill (e.g., Project Management, Sales Skills) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job the applicant is applying for */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the applicant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "resume" TEXT /* File path to the applicant's resume */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the applicant applied */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the applicant */,
  "linkedin_profile" TEXT /* LinkedIn profile URL of the applicant */,
  "portfolio_url" TEXT /* URL to the applicant's portfolio or personal website */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applicants_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES application_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applicants_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job application */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job being applied for */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application status */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "recruiter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recruiter managing the application */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the application status was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_recruiter_id FOREIGN KEY ("recruiter_id") REFERENCES recruiters ("recruiter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES application_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recruiters" (
  "recruiter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recruiter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the recruiter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the recruiter */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the recruiter works for */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the recruiter */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the recruiter within the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recruiter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recruiters_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the application status (e.g., Applied, Interviewing, Hired) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the application status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)
